methods.label: Methods
patterns: machine learning|deep learning|transformer|foundation model|protein language model|ESM|AlphaFold

sections.label: Selection & codon models
sections.query: ((("dN/dS" OR "codon model" OR HyPhy OR FEL OR MEME OR FUBAR OR BUSTED OR "branch-site") AND (selection OR evolution OR adaptive OR constraint)) OR (("episodic selection" OR "positive selection" OR "diversifying selection") AND (virus OR pathogen))) AND ("computational evolutionary biology" OR "molecular evolution" OR phylogenomics OR phylodynamics OR HyPhy OR "codon model") NOT (case report OR randomized OR psychology)

sections.label: Cancer evolution & somatic selection
sections.query: ((("cancer evolution" OR "tumor evolution" OR "somatic evolution" OR "clonal evolution") AND (genomics OR sequencing OR phylogen* OR "single-cell")) OR ((cancer OR tumor OR lymphoma OR leukemia) AND ("positive selection" OR "clonal selection" OR "driver mutation" OR "dN/dS" OR "selection inference")) OR (("mutational signature" OR "mutational signatures") AND (cancer OR tumor) AND (evolution OR selection OR phylogeny))) AND ("computational evolutionary biology" OR "molecular evolution" OR phylogenomics OR phylodynamics OR HyPhy OR "codon model") NOT (case report OR randomized OR psychology)

sections.label: Recombination & mosaicism
sections.query: (((recombination OR "mosaic genome" OR breakpoint OR "gene conversion") AND (virus OR virome OR pathogen)) OR ((RDP OR GARD OR "recombination detection") AND (sequence OR alignment))) AND ("computational evolutionary biology" OR "molecular evolution" OR phylogenomics OR phylodynamics OR HyPhy OR "codon model") NOT (case report OR randomized OR psychology)

sections.label: Phylodynamics & transmission
sections.query: (((phylodynamic* OR "time-resolved phylogeny" OR BEAST OR "birth-death" OR coalescent) AND (virus OR pathogen)) OR (("genomic epidemiology" OR "phylodynamic inference") AND (outbreak OR transmission))) AND ("computational evolutionary biology" OR "molecular evolution" OR phylogenomics OR phylodynamics OR HyPhy OR "codon model") NOT (case report OR randomized OR psychology)

sections.label: Urban / built environment virome
sections.query: (((virome OR "viral metagenomics" OR viromics) AND ("built environment" OR urban OR subway OR transit OR surface)) OR (("urban microbiome" OR MetaSUB) AND (virus OR virome OR phage))) AND ("computational evolutionary biology" OR "molecular evolution" OR phylogenomics OR phylodynamics OR HyPhy OR "codon model") NOT (case report OR randomized OR psychology)

sections.label: Wastewater / WBE viral surveillance
sections.query: ((("wastewater surveillance" OR WBE OR sewage) AND (virus OR virome OR pathogen OR SARS-CoV-2)) OR ((wastewater OR sewage) AND ("viral metagenomics" OR viromics) AND (variant OR lineage OR evolution))) AND ("computational evolutionary biology" OR "molecular evolution" OR phylogenomics OR phylodynamics OR HyPhy OR "codon model") NOT (case report OR randomized OR psychology)

sections.label: Pandemic preparedness & biosurveillance
sections.query: ((("pandemic preparedness" OR biosurveillance OR "pathogen surveillance") AND (genomics OR sequencing)) OR (("early warning" OR "sentinel surveillance") AND (metagenomics OR sequencing))) AND ("computational evolutionary biology" OR "molecular evolution" OR phylogenomics OR phylodynamics OR HyPhy OR "codon model") NOT (case report OR randomized OR psychology)

sections.label: Atlases, compendia, reference resources
sections.query: (((atlas OR database OR compendium OR "reference catalog" OR resource) AND (virome OR microbiome OR pathogen)) OR (("large-scale" OR global) AND (virome OR microbiome) AND (metadata OR harmonization))) AND ("computational evolutionary biology" OR "molecular evolution" OR phylogenomics OR phylodynamics OR HyPhy OR "codon model") NOT (case report OR randomized OR psychology)

items.title: Annotating the pangenome reveals the diversity in the genetic basis for metabolic enzymes.
items.authors: Omid Ardalani, Patrick V Phaneuf, Kalpathy J Krishnan, David Pride, Lars K Nielsen, Bernhard O Palsson
items.abstract_snippet: Affordable sequencing has flooded public databases with bacterial genomes; yet, species-scale maps that connect gene content variation to metabolic functions essential to biotechnology/system biology remain scarce. We address this gap by building a pangenome-w…

sections.label: Metagenomics benchmarking & pipelines
sections.query: ((metagenomics AND (benchmark* OR pipeline OR "best practices" OR reproducible OR workflow)) OR ((Kraken2 OR MetaPhlAn OR Bracken OR Centrifuge OR Kaiju) AND (benchmark* OR evaluation))) AND (benchmark* OR workflow OR pipeline OR Snakemake OR Nextflow OR WDL) NOT (case report OR randomized OR psychology)

sections.label: ML for evolution & pathogens
sections.query: ((("machine learning" OR "deep learning" OR transformer) AND (virus OR pathogen OR evolution OR phylogeny)) OR (("protein language model" OR ESM) AND (mutation OR evolution OR fitness))) AND ("machine learning" OR "deep learning" OR transformer OR "foundation model" OR "protein language model" OR ESM) NOT (case report OR randomized OR psychology)

items.title: Bridging local-global transmembrane protein contexts with contrastive pretraining for alignment-free pathogenicity prediction.

items.abstract_snippet: Predicting the pathogenic consequences of protein mutations is a cornerstone of precision medicine, yet it remains a formidable challenge for transmembrane proteins (TMPs), a clinically vital class of drug targets. Existing computational methods are often hamp…

items.title: Metabolomic signature reveals dysregulated lipoprotein profile in m.3243A>G carriers: a case-control study.

items.abstract_snippet: The pathogenic mitochondrial gene variant m.3243A>G disrupts oxidative phosphorylation and is associated with insulin resistance, both of which may be linked to unfavorable lipid metabolism. However, the metabolic alterations in m.3243A>G carriers, including w…

items.title: EssTFNet: integration of adaptive time-frequency and DNA language models for interpretable human essential gene prediction.
items.authors: Dong-Xin Ye, Shi-Shi Yuan, Wei Su, Hong-Qi Zhang, Rui Li, Ye-Chen Qi
items.abstract_snippet: Essential genes are defined as indispensable for an organism's survival. The loss of function of these genes results in cell death or an inability to complete the normal life cycle. Research on essential genes is pivotal in elucidating the origin and evolution…

items.title: Commentary on the fundamentals and development of artificial intelligence models in the life sciences and best research practices.
items.abstract_snippet: Machine learning has a long history in the life and natural sciences. In the age of artificial intelligence (AI), both the opportunities and challenges associated with predictive and generative modeling are increasing. To exert significant influence on experim…

items.title: Tissue identity is the dominant determinant of cross-species transferability of a porcine developmental programme.
items.authors: Tianyuan Liu, Rujing Lei, Ilyas M Khan, Peter Theobald
items.abstract_snippet: Reproducibility and cross-species translation using the domestic pig (Sus scrofa) are limited by the lack of a standardised molecular framework for biological maturation: the pig's developmental tempo differs substantially from the human's, yet no tissue-resol…

items.title: Sex Hormone Receptors, HBV Integrations and Their Prognostic Predictive Value Among Hepatocellular Carcinoma Patients.
items.authors: Die He, Xi Zeng, Lei Yin, Yang Liu, Weiping Zhou, Xing Liu
items.abstract_snippet: Hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC) related to hepatitis B virus (HBV) infection predominantly affects males, yet few studies have investigated the association between sex hormones and HBV integrations, and their involvement in HCC prognosis. We assessed estrogen r…

items.title: Computing inspired by the brain: a journey from algorithms to organoids.
items.abstract_snippet: The human brain has long served as a blueprint for computation, guiding evolution from early symbolic systems to modern deep learning models. Despite these advances, traditional computing systems remain fundamentally limited in mirroring the remarkable flexibi…

items.title: Recent advances in the detection and functional analysis of circRNAs with short-read RNA sequencing-based methods.
items.authors: Grace Lindner, Si-Mei Xu, Kristina Santucci, Yulan Gao, Michael Janitz
items.abstract_snippet: Circular RNAs (circRNAs) were first identified approximately 50 years ago in pathogenic viroids as single-stranded, covalently closed RNA molecules. Initially considered by-products of splicing, circRNAs are now recognised as an important class of regulatory R…

items.title: Rationally engineered essential oil-loaded nanocarriers for acne vulgaris: integrating multiscale molecular modeling, machine learning, and response surface optimization.

items.abstract_snippet: Acne vulgaris is a prevalent inflammatory dermatosis in which Cutibacterium acnes, Staphylococcus epidermidis, and, to a lesser extent, Staphylococcus aureus play central pathogenic roles. Conventional therapies (retinoids, antibiotics, corticosteroids) are li…

items.title: Development of a predictive model for postoperative body mass index and diabetes outcomes after metabolic bariatric surgery: retrospective cohort study.
items.authors: Vincent Ochs, Lars Kollmann, Ilan Rosenblum, Adisa Poljo, Andreas Heule, Bassey Enodien
items.abstract_snippet: Predicting postoperative body mass index (BMI) trajectories and long-term type 2 diabetes (T2D) remission after bariatric surgery remains challenging. Existing models often rely on baseline variables only and fail to incorporate dynamic postoperative changes. …
